difficulty_ladder.name: near_transfer
difficulty_ladder.goal: small variation of a task the system already almost solves

difficulty_ladder.name: controlled_variation
difficulty_ladder.goal: change one premise or missing slot while preserving the domain

difficulty_ladder.name: causal_intervention
difficulty_ladder.goal: execute the active experiment that should close the gap

difficulty_ladder.name: zero_shot_bridge
difficulty_ladder.goal: transfer the skill to an adjacent but unseen domain

difficulty_ladder.name: novel_domain
difficulty_ladder.goal: force a new domain with explicit external or sandbox validation

cases.query: A provider fails during a causal validation task. What mode should the agent enter?
Memory is unavailable but factual certainty is required. What should be opened?
A visual feature disappears and the prediction stays unchanged. What should be flagged?
If cause absent and result same, label causal status
